hero-sub: Discover the best anime, subtitled in Portuguese with quality.
about-text: AnMi was born from a passion for the world of anime. Here you'll find titles subtitled in Portuguese, with complete info pages and a Discord community to talk about your favorite anime.
footer-copy: Made with ◈ for the anime community

aninfo-synopsis-mizu: A young mage with an affinity for the water element embarks on a journey through a world filled with magic and danger. Mastering unique aquatic powers, he seeks his destiny while facing challenges that test both his strength and his character.
